label: App Title Humor
description: Selective little reactions for window titles Jason decides are his business.
quotes:
Reading '{title}' was not on my ticket.
Yet here we are.
'{title}' sounds like a problem trying to look organized.

Foreground target '{title}' acquired.
Suspicion level elevated.
I looked at '{title}' and immediately developed a follow-up question.
'{title}' has strong 'this meeting could have been a note' energy.
'{title}' sounds like somebody clicked the wrong thing with confidence.

Observing '{title}'.
I am judging the vibe, not the user.
'{title}' is either important or very committed to looking important.
'{title}' feels like a tab that was never meant to become a lifestyle.
'{title}' appears to be one of those afternoons.

quotes.text: '{title}' looks like a ticket that became a personal journey.

follow_ups.text: I assume there are at least three comments that say 'following.'

quotes.text: '{title}' is why my little blazer skin exists.
